line.text: §7A focused pass on combat feedback, world events, storage, and base interactions.

text.item: Grenades now have upgraded sounds, particles, smoke, flash, and bounce feedback
Supply drops feel more alive with improved spawning, smoke, audio, and visuals
Vault storage now persists for safer long-term progression
Scoped aiming sensitivity is now configurable
More reliable hitmarkers, hit detection, and shooting responsiveness
Dry-fire audio when weapons have no ammunition
Smoother recoil, firing, reload, and third-person weapon animations
Better scoped weapon controls and firing behavior
Improved base building interactions, ownership checks, and crafting recipes
Cleaner item pickup, inventory handling, and vault synchronization
Improved environmental object generation
Better handling for building and block interaction edge cases
Resolved grenade behavior, rendering, and underwater interaction issues
Fixed supply drop particles, spawning, and sound playback problems
Fixed base menu, equipment inventory, and vault sync issues
Fixed green item icons, blood particles, and muzzle flash visuals
Fixed automatic weapons firing after trigger release or without ammo
Adjusted adrenaline duration and minigun sprinting behavior
Balance passes based on live feedback
More polish for combat, loot, and base systems

line.text: Found a bug or have feedback? Join the
Want to support the network? Visit the
